Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1; both end effectors grasp nothing; red box remains unimpacted.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped with dual arms; red box remains unimpacted.

Precondition: box_2 is grasped with dual arms; red box remains unimpacted.
Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table; both end effectors grasp nothing; red box remains unimpacted.

Precondition: box_2 is on the table (not on box_1); both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 sides left/right are accessible; red box remains unimpacted.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual arms; red box remains unimpacted.
